title: Senior Teacher - Pune University International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pune University International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Pune University International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pune University International Enterprises:
Pune University International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University International Enterprises!
